title: We're changing the landscape of tech recruitment
text:
# We're changing the landscape of tech recruitment

But we don't like to brag. Check out what candidates have been saying about the conversational assessments Ada conducts.

TRY FOR FREE

(100% free to get started, no credit card required)

There is no pressure on me while writing an exam since I felt like I am having a discussion with a techie. :D

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ I gave more then 15+ interview for this year, they some time get connect in phone call or in skype which seems quite time consuming as one need to wait for the call and then some time network issue or hardware issue, this interview seems very good as one can give it any time and is a virtually fit with new era of interview. Ada you are perfect..!!

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ it is so crisp and clear. you helped me wherever needed and it is indeed AI :) Nice to talk with you!

⭐⭐⭐⭐ it never felt like giving online coding competition but a chat with another person who was asking questions.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ The AI Bot is amazing, I liked the interaction process throughout. Thanks, for this experience.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Perfect conversation and appropriate words 😀

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ It's rather interactive and hints was given to encourage answers from the interviewees

⭐⭐⭐⭐ its like almost human interaction interview. nice to see this kind of interview. good luck.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Loved the thought of having an interview done through a chatbot.

⭐⭐⭐⭐ Very friendly, I liked my interaction with Ada. To the point about what I'm working on, what I'm looking for and what you're is looking for.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Absolutely love the way of reacting to wrong answers in an encouraging tone and providing another chance to correct.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Quite good automation which didn't go in any random and unexpected direction and I liked that it gave the full time to think about the problems and solve them.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Patience with which the interviewer let me explain my projects.

⭐⭐⭐⭐ It was very realistic and it felt as if I had an actual guide with me.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ It's quite close to real interview, best automation i've seen to date.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Yes the first round was one of a kind. I was amazed by the adaface chat bot and and code editor that pops up within the chat interface. Great experience. Looking forward for the opportunity in CompanyX.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ The replies from the bot makes it feels like you are really interacting with a real person and the person is giving you encouragement along the way during the technical questions. It made answering the questions less intimidating and it has added some elements of fun in it. Kudos!.

⭐⭐⭐⭐ Use cases and providing the chance to answer with hint is really awesome. Keep it up.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ I love how Ada is able to give hints when I'm stuck or if I pick an incorrect answer. Kudos to the amazing AI.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Giving second chance for the answer is superb.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ It was simple,easy and I guess an innovative way of conducting an aptitude test.

⭐⭐⭐⭐ First time attending the test in chatBot. Really great and interesting. I loved it. Thanks.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Its was really a cool experience taking this test like talking to my friend. Great Exp!!

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ It was nice. Felt like I was interviewed by a human actually. The design was simple.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ This was so good it was not like an interview it was more like a chat with a friend who sounds Technically Good :)

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ The problem statements were well framed. The sequential nature of the problems, helped defining a good thought process, and i'd say apart from just questioning and answering it felt like ada had a lot of courtesy, that was the best part. 😬

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ The hints were very useful, it felt like Ada was really trying to help me solve the question. Suprised about the depth of thinking that must have gone into this.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ It is good that you gave a hint rather than passing on to next question.

⭐⭐⭐⭐ The GUI is user friendly and the bot is very interactive. Thank you.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Its a new kind of online test I have attended, I didn't except this way of interaction. Really Awesome!

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ I answered some questions incorrectly wrongly but Ada helped me with hints so i learnt some new things.
